name: phantombot-vscode
description: Chat with phantombot — your personality-first agent — in VS Code's native Chat panel via an embedded ACP client.

chatSessions.name: phantombot
chatSessions.description: Your personality-first agent — persona, memory and tools live server-side.
chatSessions.welcomeMessage: Chat with phantombot. Persona, memory and tools live server-side, so history and context persist across sessions.

chatParticipants.name: phantombot
chatParticipants.description: Ask phantombot — persona, memory and tools live server-side.

phantombot.binaryPath.markdownDescription: Absolute path to the `phantombot` binary. Leave empty to auto-discover via PATH and common install locations.

phantombot.persona.markdownDescription: Persona to bind the ACP session to (passed as `--persona`). Leave empty to use phantombot's configured default persona.
